name: The White House
subject: What Bob Dole can teach us
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ee73b9594501cc3d01d0e2d5d8773e00e9935ab40d477ba9e8a50c903e698096bf5ab26ea7340122bea57e84f96ef27f24d8c8a38092262

What Bob Dole can teach us

Former Senate Republican Leader Robert Dole will receive the Congressional Gold Medal today in a ceremony on Capitol Hill. President Donald J. Trump will speak about the importance of Dole’s legacy to conservatives and to Americans of all stripes.

A celebrated war hero, Dole holds the record for longest-serving Republican leader in the Senate. He is widely known for his bipartisan, levelheaded approach to hot-button issues such as Social Security.

As America reaches a crossroads on pivotal issues from immigration and security at our borders to opioids and crumbling infrastructure in our heartland, our leaders in Congress must look to Dole as a role model now more than ever.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ee73b9594501cc3994f6b17f3766979311ffab3b071d74d699425f6cf3ef6646ae96b292591c037f077f42e7d4412eab41438b69926e1fa
Watch the ceremony live at 3:00 p.m. E.T.

53 percent strong

“Women represent 53% of the electorate, but care about 100% of the issues,” read a large screen behind the Women of America discussion panels hosted by the White House yesterday.

Female leaders from across the U.S. government joined mothers, business owners, law-enforcement officials, and other women for three panels overseen by Director of Surrogate & Coalitions Outreach Kelly Sadler:

- The first panel covered economics, with Ivanka Trump, Secretary of Transportation Elaine Chao, and U.S. Small Business Administrator Linda McMahon touting the effects of tax and regulatory reform on American businesses—more than a third of which are headed by women.
- The next panel discussed health care. White House Counselor Kellyanne Conway opened by addressing the “crisis next door” of opioid addiction. Seema Verma, director of the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services, talked through her goal of empowering patients.
- The final group talked national security and public safety, joined by Air Force Secretary Heather Wilson, Associate Attorney General Rachel Brand, and Principal Deputy Director of National Intelligence Sue Gordon. Gordon shared how the intelligence community has grown from a primarily male-dominated field to one achieving relative gender parity.

Watch:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ee73b9594501cc32a2e0e2db02c870b0fd61f04b02a242ffe92ec8541858de79fdcb8a14cef7e2b9952972609adc798d282c9be93eb7d4b
President Trump joins A Conversation with the Women of America.

A partner to help deter North Korea

President Nursultan Nazarbayev of Kazakhstan met with President Trump in a bilateral meeting at the White House yesterday. As an elected member of the United Nations Security Council for the remainder of 2018, Kazakhstan has become an even more crucial strategic partner.

Beginning with the voluntary renunciation of its nuclear arsenal in 1992, Kazakhstan has proven itself to be a global leader on non-proliferation issues. Its relationship with America runs deep: The United States was the first country to recognize Kazakhstani independence on Christmas Day 1991.

“Together, we are determined to prevent the North Korean regime from threatening the world with nuclear devastation,” President Trump said.

Read more:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ee73b9594501cc3a17abd2b7b35bd519cf0492795ebc279e569420ea9fe439337a133126fea2ebbce5e000991fd4d05a3b1a74e01e150cb
Kazakhstan is a security partner for the 21st century.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump and President Nursultan Nazarbayev of Kazakhstan during a working lunch | January 16, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump will attend a Congressional Gold Medal ceremony honoring former Senator Bob Dole at the U.S. Capitol.

This morning, Vice President Pence will host a breakfast meeting with President Nursultan Nazarbayev of Kazakhstan. In the afternoon, the Vice President will join President Trump in attending the Congressional Gold Medal Ceremony.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ee73b9594501cc36e6462525daef342cb6a7f821e7941b884a3ca04b436979b1424b5464e192bc2eec392ff081b6d2eca62ecddac0bccb4
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=6ee73b9594501cc3de888d0b9877578ca25ff03857b017f576e8cd3c97ceeebaa270266567b4c19c8c60a9a76ea999e0304d0773062b52bd
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d48f284a10d8bec555df5dbef080cb9dbb27893a527194a2c708279e177dec82f3fa7acd7082c388cc09e9ef084b496dd5
Unsubscribe

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfe1/2a380d31/6a66747/f1de49/3741473521/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfe1/2a380d31/6a66747/f1de49/3741473521/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello,
This is unacceptable: It's been well over 100 days since Republicans in Washington let the Children's Health Insurance Program, or CHIP, expire.
**CHIP gives health insurance to around 9 million American children and now, thanks to the GOP 's failure to act, some states are just days away from running out of funding for it.**
Families across the country depend on CHIP to make sure that their kids can get and stay healthy, so we're launching an urgent grassroots petition demanding that Republicans in Congress fund this critically important program. [**Will you click here to add your name, please?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfe1/2a380d31/6a66747/f1de4a/3741473521/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/fundchipnow/?code=hassan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018_fundchip_up&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Republicans haven't just been sitting on their hands. Instead of working to fund CHIP, they jammed through a reverse Robin Hood tax scam bill that gives tax breaks to corporate billionaires instead of helping Americans who need health care.
That's right -- while Mitch McConnell's wealthy campaign backers get a tax break, 9 million children are still waiting for Republicans to fully fund CHIP.
**McConnell 's priorities are out of whack, and we need to hold him and other Republicans in Congress accountable. [Please sign our petition and call on Congress to act now to fund CHIP and ensure that American children have access to health insurance.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdfe1/2a380d31/6a66747/f1de4a/3741473521/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/fundchipnow/?code=hassan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2018_fundchip_up&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
Thank you for taking action,
Team Maggie

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: January 22nd
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| On January 22, 1973, the Supreme Court issued its ruling in a landmark case. They upheld a woman's right to privacy in making decisions about her body and health. They said that the "right of privacy...is broad enough to encompass a woman's decision whether or not to terminate her pregnancy." And 45 years later, we're still fighting for that right. | [](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fae/622b7b5b/18c13739/307bba7d/1122638599/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180117")
---
There's a misogynist in the White House. Congress is under the control of Republicans who repeatedly and unabashedly attack women's healthcare access. **This is a critical time for women's rights -- a time when we cannot afford to back down.**
According to estimates, last year's Women's March in Washington, D.C. attracted even more attendees than President Trump's inauguration. People marched across the country and around the world.
This year, we're doing it again. As of today, there are 673 marches planned, which are expected to draw almost 5 million marchers.
But not everyone can make it to a march. That's why I wanted to give all of you the opportunity to show your solidarity, whether you plan on marching or not.
[_**By the anniversary of _Roe vs. Wade_ on the 22nd, I want to gather 4,500 signatures in support of a woman's right to choose. Add yours >>**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fae/622b7b5b/18c13739/307bba7d/1122638599/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180117")
We can't let women's rights in this country go backward. If we're not careful, President Trump and Republicans in Congress will erode women's right to choose, little by little, until it's whittled down to nothing.
We cannot let that happen. I know fighting these same battles over and over again may get tiresome. But we can't afford to fall asleep on the job of protecting our right to choose.
[_**We have 5 days to gather 4,500 signatures. I know we can do it. Add your name to mine.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fae/622b7b5b/18c13739/307bba7d/1122638599/VEsF/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180117")
Thank you.
Debbie

Team,

_PBS_ is reporting that a bipartisan group of Democratic and Republican Senators have come together and reached an agreement on immigration that will protect Dreamers.

But Trump is reluctant to support it -- so we need to work our hardest right now to convince more Republicans to get on board.

[**Add your name now: urge Republicans to act to protect Dreamers _before_ time runs out.**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d790/2b07114c/b86a4ca4/731bb642/3803884493/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "http://action.dscc.org/page/s/protect-dreamers-now?source=PT-20180117-Signature_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

During his time in office, President Obama took action to guarantee that young immigrants brought to this country as children would have the right to remain here and pursue their dreams, free of the fear of deportation. But then, Donald Trump rolled back those protections, putting Dreamers' futures at risk.

Now, it's up to Congress to act -- and we have a bipartisan deal that gives Dreamers the protection and certainty they need.

**We have to make sure that not one more family is torn apart by the Trump administration 's cruel stance on DACA. Add your name right now: urge Republicans to protect Dreamers immediately:**

Thank you,

Team DSCC

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: defending our elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
The 2016 election left our country divided on many issues, but it clearly exposed one critical problem -- our democratic process is vulnerable to attack by hostile foreign powers.

The intelligence community unanimously concluded that Russia used social media platforms to mislead voters and directly hack local election boards in a brazen attempt to subvert and undermine our elections.

That's why yesterday I introduced the bipartisan DETER Act (Defending Elections from Threats by Establishing Redlines Act) with my Republican colleague Marco Rubio, to send a clear message to Russia and other foreign actors that there will be severe consequences for interfering in future elections.

[**Sign here to urge my Senate colleagues to support the DETER Act and put in place a clear deterrence strategy to protect future elections from interference by foreign powers >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91861/70cdc2ba/46f6e240/39020c3/3487664945/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-protect-future-elections-from-interference-by-foreign-powers-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Sign+here+to+urge+my+Senate+colleagues+t&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_180117&source=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_180117")

The ability to hold credible elections without outside interference is fundamental to the strength of our democracy.

I cannot underscore enough the urgency of this issue. In less than a year, Americans head to the ballot box for the midterm elections and two years later our next presidential election. It is unrealistic to think that we can simply sit back and hope we will not face another attack by a hostile foreign power -- Russia, China, North Korea or others.

[**Join me in calling on the Congress not to drag its feet, but to step up and act now to defend the integrity of our democratic process >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91861/70cdc2ba/46f6e240/39020c0/3487664945/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-protect-future-elections-from-interference-by-foreign-powers-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Join+me+in+calling+on+the+Congress+not+t&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_180117&source=CVH_EM_PET_FULL_180117")

This is a threat that demands strong and decisive bipartisan action -- the DETER Act would send an unequivocal message to the Kremlin and others: We will not tolerate an attack on our elections.

Thank you for working to protect the integrity of our democratic process,

Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator

name: Jason Yates
subject: Update on Dr. Ben Carson’s work
body:
Dear Peter,
I wanted to make sure you saw Dr. Carson’s exciting Housing and Urban Development announcement.
Dr. Carson has always believed in helping others overcome poverty by equipping them with the skills and knowledge they need to become self-sufficient.
Now he is taking that philosophy and applying it to those living in government-provided housing.
Dr. Carson isn’t separating faith from the equation like so many other government programs. He has built-in opportunities for people of faith to step up to the plate and help meet the needs of their communities.
[Read our quick update on Dr. Carson’s new pilot program.](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fdr-carsons-new-hud-initiative%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180117_com_s1&n=1)
As I got to know Dr. Carson when he served as our Founding Honorary National Chairman at My Faith Votes, the one thing I most appreciated about him was this: he genuinely sees our faith as central to solving the problems we face in this world.
Please continue to pray for Dr. Carson and the people working in the Department of Housing and Urban Development. Pray they would continue to be successful at lifting more Americans out of poverty.
Jason Yates
CEO
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180117_com_s1&n=2)

name: Shannon Jackson
subject: This weekend: Meeting of DNC Rules and Bylaws Committee
body:
#
Friends,
This weekend's meetings are where the rubber will meet the road for the DNC. The Rules and Bylaws Committee will meet this weekend to determine which of the recommendations proposed by the Unity Reform Commission will move forward to be voted on by the DNC. Here's a quick refresher on the progress made by the Unity Reform Commission in **making the Democratic presidential nomination process more accessible, transparent, and inclusive** :
* Converting 60 percent of the Superdelegates to pledged delegates based on the results of presidential primaries and caucuses.
* Electoral reforms including same-day registration, same day party change, and absentee voting in caucus states.
* Greater disclosure of Democratic National Committee spending and an Ombudsman Council of elected DNC members to review complaints about Charter and Bylaws violations.
* An open nominating process for party leadership positions at the DNC and in all state parties, based on greater diversity and differences in viewpoints.

[**We need you at this weekend 's meetings to make sure the Rules and Bylaws Committee of the DNC votes for a truly democratic presidential nomination process!**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ada3/bed43eb/347e3806/75feaa0c/3227617737/VEsH/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/Rules-and-Bylaws-Committee-Meeting-in-DC")
****[RSVP](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ada3/bed43eb/347e3806/75feaa0f/3227617737/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/Rules-and-Bylaws-Committee-Meeting-in-DC")****
The power of the people is what took the Bernie 2016 campaign from a tiny office in Vermont to a national campaign, supported by millions. **We are calling on the power of the people again.**
[Can I count on you to make it to this weekend's meetings?](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7ada3/bed43eb/347e3806/75feaa0c/3227617737/VEsF/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/Rules-and-Bylaws-Committee-Meeting-in-DC")
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution

WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

name: Leah
subject: wake up, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
Last night, in the 10th State Senate district special election, State Rep. Adam Jarchow (Republican) lost to Patty Schachtner (Democrat) in a district

Friend, if you haven't heard the news, I'm sorry to be the one to break it. But...

Last night, in the 10th State Senate district special election, State Rep. Adam Jarchow (Republican) lost to Patty Schachtner (Democrat) in a district represented by Republicans since 2001.

Governor Walker is calling it a wake-up call, friend.

And he's right - it is one.

Republicans cannot afford to be complacent and sit out of the election process if we want to keep moving forward on the progress Republicans like me have made with Governor Walker in Wisconsin.

[**That's why I'm asking you to chip in $100, $50 or even $25 now. Because without your support, this could happen again.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=89efb154af49469385e292b69f043914&_e=6iuPRvRkV4B4LBskpnTUAHTOgrAxZfsOzA3T9TCYdLfu0L5bes_54jk5Fw7Bk3hMGV0opilQLkiH4BESUSrCZMKH5qusZD8Hdf7n5qkGWa6sauQvfw475xnBpoSk96OIWImK-boHXjFvzlAHpOQfqK319oPnpW6g0jOZXASXAbbpeAZ70BEo3BbKrb7F4yiwH-7TCexzA1PxjBhZeM3gZ97aGaquckJbqN673ccBf9fDFLoEF0zVOwVV6fEQbTl8WB0QDAKQoD4zIB2lR7GZiY_U63n_rOXYjAEqHZZOvitl63pmUlz2v0C64SKl15s_cCTd7_cOao4FZ6HGfTNCK2D4n94EBoRJI4UjXi0hKLbXAHeIciGhjqHUygwrCxXeP4y17gaT4hN2P5NYFJT8HByZL8f6BFnniFnILmXzh_A%3D)

After Governor Walker and Donald Trump's wins in Wisconsin, we forgot that Democrats are really good at turning out the vote when they want to.

We have to remember... It'll be the same later this year.

Outside efforts from big Democrat leaders, like Barack Obama and Eric Holder, will surely be working their tails off to turn it out big for liberals like Tammy Baldwin. _And we have to be ready. _

And we have to be ready with the right candidate who can beat Tammy Baldwin. I’ve proven before when I ran for State Senate that I know how to beat incumbent Democrats. My record of wins will make it easy to attack Tammy who has done nothing good for our state.

Please, pledge your support today: **[https://secure.leahvukmir.com/donate/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=89efb154af49469385e292b69f043914&_e=6iuPRvRkV4B4LBskpnTUAHTOgrAxZfsOzA3T9TCYdLfu0L5bes_54jk5Fw7Bk3hMGV0opilQLkiH4BESUSrCZMKH5qusZD8Hdf7n5qkGWa6sauQvfw475xnBpoSk96OIWImK-boHXjFvzlAHpOQfqK319oPnpW6g0jOZXASXAbbpeAZ70BEo3BbKrb7F4yiwBJR0c-4oHHv937v_G1-dP6fCsTAniqSCDDcixqeLk-LUm1FZySJ5VtZvJn4nIL7BB2y9vrlxUONYa3fdNvA9S-he3tnWqXPXFGia1zBPJ75BpFDwP6sgKxCRthRD5sXFsSb6-JP5RxOZSoXf6_YjKqrFx13ENAJbpNAUCBCasW7m2_uPt2BD53bQYrtQqS3n6WaA64KOBeUaiXe5Fj18da3i-ZqlhLm--CgQQa5fjsM%3D)**

clean_body: Last night, in the 10th State Senate district special election, State Rep. Adam Jarchow (Republican) lost to Patty Schachtner (Democrat) in a district Friend, if you haven't heard the news, I'm sorry to be the one to break it. But... Last night, in the 10th State Senate district special election, State Rep. Adam Jarchow (Republican) lost to Patty Schachtner (Democrat) in a district represented by Republicans since 2001. Governor Walker is calling it a wake-up call, friend. And he's right - it is one. Republicans cannot afford to be complacent and sit out of the election process if we want to keep moving forward on the progress Republicans like me have made with Governor Walker in Wisconsin. After Governor Walker and Donald Trump's wins in Wisconsin, we forgot that Democrats are really good at turning out the vote when they want to. We have to remember... It'll be the same later this year. Outside efforts from big Democrat leaders, like Barack Obama and Eric Holder, will surely be working their tails off to turn it out big for liberals like Tammy Baldwin. And we have to be ready. And we have to be ready with the right candidate who can beat Tammy Baldwin. I’ve proven before when I ran for State Senate that I know how to beat incumbent Democrats. My record of wins will make it easy to attack Tammy who has done nothing good for our state. Please, pledge your support today: I’ve fought alongside Governor Walker to create a better system in Wisconsin, and we’ve made great progress with conservative reforms. But none of that means a thing if you're not active. That’s why we need you to be involved, friend. Please, chip in to show you’re with me today, and we'll be in touch on how we plan to head off this “wake-up call.” Thanks, Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Wayne at Sortd
subject: Something from Sortd to help you grow your business
body:
Hey , hope you are well.
It's been a while... I just wanted to let you know about a new and exciting Sortd for Gmail development.
While Sortd was previously just about transforming your email into managed lists, we've now released [Sortd for Sales](http://live.everlytic.net/servlet/link/171658/859521/192962980/4517293). This feature has been built specifically to help small businesses manage their deal pipeline, leads and customers in a really simple way right inside Gmail!
Here's a quick demo video -
[](http://live.everlytic.net/servlet/link/171658/859521/192962980/4517294)
If you've ever struggled to keep track of your team's deals (inluding your own) or follow-ups with prospective customers... or if you just want to gain insight into your sales pipeline without a complicated CRM, then Sortd for Sales is for you! It's cost effective, ultra simple sales management made exclusively for Gmail users!
If you still have Sortd installed - to give it a try add a sales board from the Board dropdown at the top right in fullscreen mode. If you don't use the link below to install again. For more info on how Sortd for Sales works [read more about it here](http://live.everlytic.net/servlet/link/171658/859521/192962980/4517295)...
BTW if this mail isn't relevant to you I'd really appreciate it if you would pass it on to anyone in your organization who might be interested before deleting.
Best
**Wayne Silbermann**
\- Co-founder | Obsessive List-maker
This email was sent to you from Sortd . If you no longer wish to receive emails like this you can [unsubscribe](http://live.everlytic.net/public/contacts/unsubscribe/udsQjjydzGmweQpg/m7YDzmwoItRP6vk2/1564fe331c284284) from our mailing list. If you don't have Sortd installed and you want to add it again you can [add Sortd to Gmail here](http://live.everlytic.net/servlet/link/171658/859521/192962980/4517296).

subject: UPDATE: Save Net Neutrality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdffe/2a380d31/6917405/f1debb/2284942644/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdffe/2a380d31/6917405/f1debb/2284942644/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Team --
At the end of 2017, Trump's Federal Communications Commission, or the FCC, voted to repeal net neutrality, the rules put in place to protect a fair and open Internet.
Net neutrality is what prevents Internet service providers like AT&T, Comcast, and Verizon from speeding up or impeding your connection, and from dictating the websites, applications, and content you can use. In short, it preserves your right to communicate freely online.
Senate Democrats are doing everything they can to counter the net neutrality ban, and they're just **_one vote short_ on a measure which would override the FCC's disastrous ruling.**
Senator Hassan and other Democrats need your help to keep the pressure on and swing one more vote in our favor. [**Please sign our urgent petition calling on Republicans in Congress to override the FCC 's ruling and protect net neutrality.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdffe/2a380d31/6917405/f1dea4/2284942644/VEsF/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/2018_NetNeutrality?source=e20170117_savenn_act")
Here's what's at stake: Without net neutrality, ISPs can slow down their competitors' content or stop you from seeing important news or political stories, just because they disagree with it.
**We can stop the dismantling of net neutrality, but we have a very small window in which to do it.**
[**If you care about a free and open Internet, put your name down to urge Senate Republicans to reinstate net neutrality rules.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdffe/2a380d31/6917405/f1dea4/2284942644/VEsC/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/2018_NetNeutrality?source=e20170117_savenn_act")
Thank you,
Team Maggie
